content:
# Tasks Breakdown: Hybrid Email Attachment System

## Overview

Straightforward implementation: download small files (<5MB), attach to email. Large files stay as Drive links. Single threshold, clean fallback, zero breaking changes.

---

## Task 0: Architecture Decision Record

### Task 0.1: Write ADR for hybrid approach

**File:** `docs/adr/003-hybrid-email-attachments.md`

**Why First:** Document the "why" before writing code.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Document context: recipient accessibility vs system complexity
- [ ] Document decision: 5MB threshold with Drive link fallback
- [ ] Document consequences: +3s latency, graceful degradation
- [ ] Document alternatives rejected: all-attachments, all-links

**Time:** 30 minutes

---

## 1. Core Services

### Task 1.1: Add downloadFile() to GoogleDriveClient

**File:** `backend/src/modules/attachments/services/google-drive-client.service.ts`

**Description:** Download file from Drive as in-memory Buffer.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Implement `downloadFile(userId, fileId): Promise<Buffer>`
- [ ] Use `alt: 'media'` and `responseType: 'arraybuffer'`
- [ ] Reuse existing `retryOperation()` and `handleDriveError()`

**Reference Pattern:** See existing `getFileInfo()` method - same retry/error logic.

**Time:** 1 hour

---

### Task 1.2: Create AttachmentProcessorService

**File:** `backend/src/modules/email/services/attachment-processor.service.ts`

**Description:** Size-based decision logic: attach small files, link large files.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Implement `processAttachments(userId, attachments[]): Promise<ProcessedAttachments>`
- [ ] Apply 5MB per-file and 20MB total thresholds
- [ ] Fallback to Drive links on any download failure (no exceptions thrown)
- [ ] Update `docs/project-info/architecture.md` with new service component

**Key Interfaces:**
```typescript
interface ProcessedAttachments {
  attachments: Array<{ filename, buffer, mimeType, size }>;
  links: Array<{ filename, driveUrl, size, reason }>;
  totalAttachmentSize: number;
}
```

**Reference Pattern:** See `GoogleDriveClient` for retry/error patterns.

**Time:** 3 hours

---

## 2. Email Composition

### Task 2.1: Update GmailClient for multipart MIME

**File:** `backend/src/modules/email/services/gmail-client.service.ts`

**Description:** Add RFC 2822 multipart/mixed support for email attachments.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Add optional `attachments[]` to `IEmailSendRequest` interface
- [ ] Extract current logic to `createSimpleMessage()` private method
- [ ] Implement `createMultipartMessage()` for attachments
- [ ] Update `packages/types/src/email/email.types.ts`
- [ ] Update `docs/project-info/api-endpoints.md` with attachment parameter

**MIME Structure:**
```
multipart/mixed; boundary="xxx"
--xxx
Content-Type: text/html
<body>
--xxx
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.pdf"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64
<base64_content>
--xxx--
```

**Time:** 2 hours

---

### Task 2.2: Update EmailTemplateService for mixed rendering

**File:** `backend/src/modules/email/services/email-template.service.ts`

**Description:** Render both attached files and Drive links in email HTML.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Add overload: `generateClaimEmail(..., processedAttachments?: ProcessedAttachments)`
- [ ] Render "📎 Attached Files" section (show filename + size)
- [ ] Render "☁️ Files on Google Drive" section (show link + size)
- [ ] Implement `formatFileSize(bytes): string` helper
- [ ] Maintain XSS escaping for all user input

**Time:** 2 hours

---

### Task 2.3: Update EmailService orchestration

**File:** `backend/src/modules/email/services/email.service.ts`

**Description:** Wire AttachmentProcessorService into email sending workflow.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Call `attachmentProcessorService.processAttachments()` after validation
- [ ] Pass result to `emailTemplateService.generateClaimEmail()`
- [ ] Map attachments to Gmail API format
- [ ] Add `AttachmentProcessorService` to `email.module.ts` providers

**Existing Logic:** Maintain current transaction handling, error flows, status updates.

**Time:** 1 hour

---

## 3. Testing

### Task 3.1: Unit tests for GoogleDriveClient.downloadFile

**File:** `backend/src/modules/attachments/services/__tests__/google-drive-client.service.spec.ts`

**Test Cases:**
- [ ] Downloads file as Buffer
- [ ] Retries on 503, throws on 404
- [ ] Respects maxRetries (3 attempts)

**Time:** 1 hour

---

### Task 3.2: Unit tests for AttachmentProcessorService

**File:** `backend/src/modules/email/services/__tests__/attachment-processor.service.spec.ts`

**Test Cases:**
- [ ] Attaches files <5MB, links files ≥5MB
- [ ] Respects 20MB total size limit
- [ ] Fallback to link on download failure
- [ ] Sorts smallest files first

**Time:** 2 hours

---

### Task 3.3: Unit tests for GmailClient multipart MIME

**File:** `backend/src/modules/email/services/__tests__/gmail-client.service.spec.ts`

**Test Cases:**
- [ ] Creates simple message (no attachments)
- [ ] Creates multipart message (with attachments)
- [ ] Proper MIME boundaries and base64 encoding

**Time:** 1.5 hours

---

### Task 3.4: Unit tests for EmailTemplateService

**File:** `backend/src/modules/email/services/__tests__/email-template.service.spec.ts`

**Test Cases:**
- [ ] Renders attachments section, links section, both sections
- [ ] Formats file sizes correctly (B, KB, MB)
- [ ] Escapes HTML in filenames
- [ ] `formatFileSize()` helper tests (0 bytes, KB, MB edge cases)

**Time:** 1.5 hours

---

### Task 3.5: Integration tests

**File:** `backend/src/modules/email/services/__tests__/email.service.integration.spec.ts`

**Test Cases:**
- [ ] Sends email with mixed attachments + links
- [ ] Sends attachments-only, links-only
- [ ] Fallback to links on Drive API failure
- [ ] Updates claim status (SENT on success, FAILED on error)

**Time:** 2 hours

---

## Execution Plan

### Critical Path (Sequential)
```
Task 0.1 (ADR)
  ↓
Task 1.1 (GoogleDrive.downloadFile)
  ↓
Task 1.2 (AttachmentProcessor)
  ↓
Task 2.3 (EmailService orchestration)
  ↓
Task 3.5 (Integration tests)
```

### Parallel Work (After Task 1.2)
```
Task 2.1 (GmailClient) ───→ Task 3.3 (Gmail tests)
Task 2.2 (EmailTemplate) ──→ Task 3.4 (Template tests)
```

**Rationale:** Tasks 2.1 and 2.2 have zero dependencies on each other. Implement in parallel.

---

## Time Estimate

| Phase | Tasks | Time |
|-------|-------|------|
| ADR | 0.1 | 0.5h |
| Core | 1.1, 1.2 | 4h |
| Email (parallel) | 2.1, 2.2 | 2h |
| Orchestration | 2.3 | 1h |
| Unit Tests (parallel) | 3.1-3.4 | 6h |
| Integration | 3.5 | 2h |

**Total: 15.5 hours (~2 days)**

---

## Definition of Done

**Per Task:**
- [ ] Acceptance criteria met
- [ ] Tests written and passing (`make test/unit`)
- [ ] Code formatted and linted (`make format && make lint`)
- [ ] Documentation updated inline (if applicable)

**No Separate Doc Phase:** Update docs WITH code changes, not after.

---

## Risk Mitigation

**Task 1.1 (Download):**
- Risk: API failures break email sending
- Mitigation: Fallback to Drive links (tested in Task 3.2)

**Task 2.1 (MIME):**
- Risk: Malformed MIME breaks delivery
- Mitigation: Follow RFC 2822 exactly, validate in Task 3.3

**Task 3.5 (Integration):**
- Risk: Missing edge cases
- Mitigation: Test all failure paths (size limits, API errors, mixed delivery)

---

## Reference Implementations

**Retry Pattern:** See `GoogleDriveClient.retryOperation()`
**Error Handling:** See `GoogleDriveClient.handleDriveError()`
**Service Structure:** See `EmailTemplateService` (existing)
**Testing Pattern:** See `google-drive-client.service.spec.ts`

---

## Task Status

| Task | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| 0.1 | [ ] Pending | Write ADR first |
| 1.1 | [ ] Pending | - |
| 1.2 | [ ] Pending | - |
| 2.1 | [ ] Pending | Parallel with 2.2 |
| 2.2 | [ ] Pending | Parallel with 2.1 |
| 2.3 | [ ] Pending | - |
| 3.1 | [ ] Pending | - |
| 3.2 | [ ] Pending | - |
| 3.3 | [ ] Pending | - |
| 3.4 | [ ] Pending | - |
| 3.5 | [ ] Pending | Final validation |

---

**Document Version:** 2.0 (Linus-approved)
**Last Updated:** 2025-09-30
**Line Count:** ~250 (down from 614)
